description: Default category catalog template for project-local customization.

categories.name: GENERAL
categories.description: General or fallback errors that do not fit a more specific category.

categories.name: CONFIGURATION
categories.description: Errors related to configuration values, configuration files, and application setup.

categories.name: VALIDATION
categories.description: Errors related to invalid, missing, unsupported, duplicate, or inconsistent input values.

categories.name: STARTUP
categories.description: Errors that usually happen while an application is starting or initializing.

categories.name: FILE_SYSTEM
categories.description: Errors related to files, directories, paths, permissions, and project-local workspaces.

categories.name: SECURITY
categories.description: Errors related to authentication, authorization, tokens, secrets, and permission checks.

categories.name: NETWORK
categories.description: Errors related to connectivity, DNS, HTTP, proxies, VPN, timeouts, and remote endpoints.

categories.name: DATABASE
categories.description: Errors related to database connectivity, queries, records, migrations, and concurrency.

categories.name: EXTERNAL_SERVICE
categories.description: Errors related to third-party services, remote APIs, gateways, and provider integrations.

categories.name: SERIALIZATION
categories.description: Errors related to JSON, serialization, deserialization, schema versions, and data formats.
